import { NgTemplateOutlet } from '@angular/common';
import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, DestroyRef, effect, inject, LOCALE_ID, signal, TemplateRef } from '@angular/core';
import { toSignal } from '@angular/core/rxjs-interop';
import { input, model, output } from '@angular/core';
import { FormArray, FormControl, FormGroup, ReactiveFormsModule, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { IFormMock } from 'src/app/api/api-reference';
import { IFieldExpressionDictionary, IFieldPropertyExpressionDictionary, SelectConfiguration, sortOptions, ENTRY_ASYNC_VALIDATOR_RESOLVER } from '@enigmatry/entry-form';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-g-mock-edit',
  imports: [ReactiveFormsModule, NgTemplateOutlet],
  templateUrl: './mock-edit-generated.component.html',
  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
})
export class MockEditGeneratedComponent {
    protected readonly isReadonly = input<boolean>(false);
    protected readonly model = model<IFormMock>({} as IFormMock);
    protected readonly saveButtonText = input<string>('Save');
    protected readonly cancelButtonText = input<string>('Cancel');
    protected readonly saveButtonDisabled = input<boolean>(false);
    protected readonly formButtonsTemplate = input<TemplateRef<unknown> | null | undefined>();

    protected readonly fieldsHideExpressions = input<IFieldExpressionDictionary<IFormMock> | undefined>();
    protected readonly fieldsLabelExpressions = input<IFieldPropertyExpressionDictionary<IFormMock> | undefined>();
    protected readonly fieldsPropertyExpressions = input<IFieldPropertyExpressionDictionary<IFormMock> | undefined>();
    protected readonly fieldsDisableExpressions = input<IFieldExpressionDictionary<IFormMock> | undefined>();
    protected readonly fieldsRequiredExpressions = input<IFieldExpressionDictionary<IFormMock> | undefined>();

    private readonly formStatusOptions = signal([{ value: null, displayName: $localize `:@@empty-option.none:None` }, { value: 0, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.first:First` }, { value: 1, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.second:Second` }, { value: 2, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.third:Third` }]);
    protected readonly formStatusOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: 'displayName' });
    private readonly mockRadioOptions = signal([{ value: 0, displayName: `First` }, { value: 1, displayName: `Second` }, { value: 2, displayName: `Third` }]);
    protected readonly mockRadioOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: '' });
    private readonly mockBoolSelectOptions = signal([{ value: true, displayName: $localize `:@@true-label:This is true` }, { value: false, displayName: $localize `:@@false-label:This is false` }]);
    protected readonly mockBoolSelectOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: '' });
    private readonly mockMultiCheckboxOptions = signal([{ value: 0, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.first:First` }, { value: 1, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.second:Second` }, { value: 2, displayName: $localize `:@@enum.enum-mock.third:Third` }]);
    protected readonly mockMultiCheckboxOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: '' });
    private readonly multiCheckboxWithStringIdsOptions = signal([{ value: 'value_1', displayName: $localize `:@@translation_Id_1:Label 1` }, { value: -9, displayName: $localize `:@@translation_Id_3:Label 3` }, { value: 1234567, displayName: $localize `:@@translation_Id_4:Label 4` }, { value: 2, displayName: $localize `:@@translation_Id_5:Label 5` }, { value: null, displayName: $localize `:@@translation_Id_6:Label 6` }]);
    protected readonly multiCheckboxWithStringIdsOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: '' });
    protected readonly categoryIdCallback = input<Observable<unknown[]>>([]);
    private readonly categoryIdOptions = toSignal(this.categoryIdCallback(), { initialValue: [] });
    protected readonly categoryIdOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'id', labelProperty: 'categoryName', sortProperty: 'categoryName' });
    protected readonly typesCallback = input<Observable<unknown[]>>([]);
    private readonly typesOptions = toSignal(this.typesCallback(), { initialValue: [] });
    protected readonly typesOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({});
    private readonly regionOptions = signal([{ value: 'EU', displayName: $localize `:@@region.europe:Europe` }, { value: 'NA', displayName: $localize `:@@region.na:North America` }, { value: 'AP', displayName: $localize `:@@region.ap:Asia Pacific` }]);
    protected readonly regionOptionsConfiguration = input<SelectConfiguration>({ valueProperty: 'value', labelProperty: 'displayName', sortProperty: '' });
    protected readonly displayRegion = (value: unknown): string =>
        (this.regionOptions() as Record<string, unknown>[])
            .find(option => option['value'] === value)?.['displayName'] as string ?? '';

    protected readonly save = output<IFormMock>();
    protected readonly cancel = output<void>();
    protected readonly buttonClick = output<string>();

    private readonly destroyRef = inject(DestroyRef);
    private readonly localeId = inject<string>(LOCALE_ID);
    private readonly asyncValidatorResolver = inject(ENTRY_ASYNC_VALIDATOR_RESOLVER, { optional: true });

    protected readonly form = new FormGroup({
        id: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
        name: new FormControl<string | null>('DEFAULT NAME', { validators: [Validators.required, Validators.maxLength(50), Validators.pattern(/[A-Z]/)], asyncValidators: this.asyncValidatorResolver ? [this.asyncValidatorResolver('uniqueName'), this.asyncValidatorResolver('isEnsured')] : [], updateOn: 'blur' }),
        description: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
        date: new FormControl({ value: null, disabled: true }, { updateOn: 'blur' }),
        money: new FormControl<string | null>(null, { validators: [Validators.max(999.99 - 0.1)] }),
        amount: new FormControl<string | null>(null, { validators: [Validators.required, Validators.min(0 + 1), Validators.max(100)] }),
        formStatus: new FormControl(null),
        mockRadio: new FormControl(null),
        mockBoolSelect: new FormControl(null),
        mockMultiCheckbox: new FormControl<unknown[] | null>(null),
        multiCheckboxWithStringIds: new FormControl<unknown[] | null>(null),
        categoryId: new FormControl(null),
        types: new FormControl<unknown[] | null>(null),
        password: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
        isActive: new FormControl<boolean>(true),
        notes: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
        region: new FormControl(null),
        fileUpload: new FormControl(null),
        addresses: new FormArray<FormGroup>([]),
        dateAndTime: new FormControl(null, { updateOn: 'blur' }),
        email1: new FormControl<string | null>(null, { validators: [Validators.pattern(/^\w+([-+.']\w+)*@\w+([-.]\w+)*\.\w+([-.]\w+)*$/), Validators.maxLength(50)] }),
        email2: new FormControl<string | null>(null, { validators: [Validators.pattern(/^\w+([-+.']\w+)*@\w+([-.]\w+)*\.\w+([-.]\w+)*$/), Validators.maxLength(50)] }),
    });

    protected readonly createAddressesItem = (): FormGroup => {
        return new FormGroup({
            id: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
            city: new FormControl<string | null>('Amsterdam'),
            street: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
            houseNumber: new FormControl<string | null>(null),
            verified: new FormControl<boolean>({ value: false, disabled: true }),
        });
    };

    constructor() {
        effect(() => {
            this.form.patchValue(this.model() as unknown as typeof this.form.value, { emitEvent: false });
        });
        effect(() => {
            if (this.isReadonly()) {
                this.form.disable({ emitEvent: false });
            } else {
                this.form.enable({ emitEvent: false });
                this.form.get('date')?.disable({ emitEvent: false });
            }
        });
    }

    protected readonly onSubmit = (event: Event): void => {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (this.form.valid) {
            this.save.emit(this.form.getRawValue() as IFormMock);
        }
    };

    protected readonly isHidden = (propertyName: string, staticVisible: boolean): boolean => {
        if (!staticVisible) { 
			return true; 
		}

        return this.fieldsHideExpressions()?.[propertyName]?.(this.model()) ?? false;
    };

    protected readonly isDisabled = (propertyName: string, staticReadonly: boolean): boolean => {
        return this.isReadonly() || (this.fieldsDisableExpressions()?.[propertyName]
            ? this.fieldsDisableExpressions()![propertyName](this.model())
            : staticReadonly);
    };
}
